events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Rock God Turns 79
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th birthday to the one and only Brian May! His iconic riffs with Queen continue to inspire generations.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Still Got the Moves
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to the indestructible Mick Jagger! Still commanding stages worldwide with that legendary energy.

events.title: MTV launched 45 years ago
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever. The first video? The ironically titled 'Video Killed The Radio Star' by The Buggles.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' 32 years ago
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which became an immediate commercial and critical hit.

angles.name: Oasis Debut Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British rock. What's your favourite track from this iconic debut?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began 57 years ago
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace, Love & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for three days of peace, love, and music at Woodstock. An unforgettable moment in history.

events.title: Remembering Elvis Presley, who would have been 91
events.blurb: Elvis Presley died on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42. He would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: The King's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away 49 years ago today. His music lives on.

events.title: Tupac Shakur would have been 55
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25, after being shot in a drive-by shooting in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996. He would have been 55 this year.

angles.name: Remembering Tupac
angles.copy: 30 years since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and influence continue to resonate across generations.

events.title: Jimi Hendrix would have been 84
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix died on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84 this year.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Remembered
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who left us too soon 56 years ago today. His guitar mastery remains unmatched.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' 57 years ago
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, and in the US on October 1, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing photo is just as famous as the incredible music within.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Punk Rock Icon's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon whose voice and attitude continue to captivate.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Former Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that unmistakable swagger and sound.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (UK single) 51 years ago
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the UK on October 1, 1975. The album was released in 1971.

angles.name: Imagine 51st Anniversary
angles.copy: 51 years ago, John Lennon released 'Imagine' in the UK. Its message of peace and unity is as powerful today as it ever was.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod 25 years ago
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it began shipping on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: 25 Years of iPod
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod, revolutionising how we carry our music. Remember your first one?

events.title: Happy James Bond Day!
events.blurb: James Bond Day celebrates the release of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', on October 5, 1962.

angles.name: 007 Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Celebrating over six decades of espionage, iconic gadgets, and unforgettable theme tunes. What's your favourite Bond film?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940. He would have been 86 this year.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: Remembering John Lennon on what would have been his 86th birthday. His music and message of peace continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The iconic British comedian and actor John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of British comedy.
